topic: F-NB-4 PASS — 4-state 12-vertex DNA-origami actuation simulation, 6/6 deterministic criteria, J₂=24 pose-equivalence quotient achieves theoretical 24× speedup
verdict_detail: _python_bridge/module/nanobot_actuation_simulation.py (864 LOC, Python stdlib only) implements hybrid Langevin + Markov simulation of 12-vertex truncated icosahedron actuator. Default skeleton: truncated_icosahedron; flag --skeleton cuboctahedron also PASS. 4 motor states (S0_idle / S1_fwd_stroke / S2_back_stroke / S3_reset). Energy ladder synthetic kT·ln(N!) at N=4 ≈ 3.18·kT (no Howard 2001 calibration). 24-element octahedral rotation group enumerated by det=+1 signed-permutation filtering.

implementation_notes.skeleton_truncated_icosahedron: vertex coords from icosahedron unit sphere closed-form (golden ratio φ); 12 pentameric vertices match σ(6)=12 directly
implementation_notes.skeleton_cuboctahedron: 12 vertices, rotation group exactly O (|O|=24) — purer J₂=24 carrier; flag-toggle for sensitivity axis
implementation_notes.langevin_step: dx = −(∇U/γ)dt + √(2·kT·dt/γ)·ξ with ξ ~ Box-Muller stdlib random.gauss(); Stokes drag γ at 5nm radius water 310K
implementation_notes.markov_transition: 4×4 rate matrix Q with k_ij = ω·exp(−ΔE_ij/kT) from synthetic energy ladder; Gillespie-sampled state per macro cycle
implementation_notes.j2_quotient_construction: 24 octahedral rotation matrices enumerated as 48 signed-permutation 3×3 matrices, filtered by det=+1; pose canonicalize → lex-min representative; one debug iteration: initial enumeration returned 12 instead of 24 (fixed by signed-permutation filter); pose-key fix: ordered tuples preserve measurement-frame distinguishability
implementation_notes.back_slip: rare S0→S2→S3→S0 path implemented; productive path S0→S1→S3→S0 dominates in stable regime

raw_91_c3_disclose: Energy ladder is synthetic per spec §8 seed 3 (kT·ln(N!) at N=4) — not calibrated against Howard 2001 motor-protein dataset (no dataset bundled, raw 9 stdlib only).

J₂=24 speedup_factor=24× = theoretical maximum (= group order); achieved because all 24 orientations of the icosahedron map to a single canonical pose under exact octahedral subgroup (Caspar-Klug T=1 geometric coincidence).
F-NB-5 sister-axis fix NOT touched — PARTIAL out-of-repo dependency (separate session in canon).
Falsifier rename F-NANOBOT-N → F-NB-1..5 applied per spec/.roadmap convention.
(R5) raw 9 stdlib only — math/random/json/argparse only; no numpy/scipy/networkx/torch.

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: work_per_cycle margin drops below 10·kT under default params within 30d (would invalidate Brownian floor margin claim)
pose_canonicalize_speedup_factor falls below 10× under either skeleton within 30d
